name: Method Classification review for Model Choice and Student-Simulation Validity Update bundle
summary: Accepted. Do et al. is classified as prompted simulated-student role play plus post-training experiments; Yuan et al. as a conceptual framework; and Martynova et al. as mixed-method teacher/stakeholder authenticity evidence based on MathDial and interviews. The bundle does not recast post-training results as an implementation plan.

findings.claim_or_issue: Do et al.'s SFT/DPO/GRPO results are included as evidence that prompt-only simulation has limits and misconception faithfulness is trainable, not as a recommendation that this project should fine-tune models.
findings.why_it_matters: The user explicitly excluded first-hand fine-tuning or model-comparison research from the next step.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the fine-tuning scope caveat in the finding and memo update.
